title: rhododendron jiewhoei
intro: Rhododendron jiewhoei, also known as the Jiew Hoei or the Thai Rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its roots, leaves, and flowers being used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rhododendron jiewhoei include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a tea or taken as a supplement.
